sign_up_task.name: Sign up for a task
sign_up_task.desc: Pick a task from the board and begin your first praxis.

start_collaboration.name: Start a collaboration
start_collaboration.desc: Pool a task with other questers and split the work.

worn_paths.name: Notice the paths already worn
worn_paths.desc: Well-trodden ground hums faintly underfoot. You'll learn to trust it.

duels.name: Challenge a duel
duels.desc: Stake reputation against another quester and settle it in the field.

comment.name: Leave a comment
comment.desc: Weigh in on any praxis with a word of your own.

retired_tasks.name: See retired tasks
retired_tasks.desc: The archive opens — browse tasks the board has since retired.

weather_early.name: Read weather a day early
weather_early.desc: Clouds tell you their plans before the sky commits to them.

propose_task.name: Propose a task
propose_task.desc: Draft a task of your own and submit it to the board.

pending_tasks.name: See pending tasks
pending_tasks.desc: Watch proposals move through review before they go live.

shortcut_sense.name: Sense a shortcut before taking it
shortcut_sense.desc: Some routes simply feel correct. You've started to notice which.

flag_praxis.name: Flag a praxis
flag_praxis.desc: Send questionable praxis to moderation review.

second_character.name: Create a second character
second_character.desc: Start a new character on this account, independent of this one.

lie_pitch.name: Hear a lie land wrong
lie_pitch.desc: Untrue words ring a half-step flat. Useful, if unsettling.

distance_taste.name: Taste distance in the air
distance_taste.desc: Far-off places have a flavor. You're close enough now to notice.

see_metatasks.name: See the metatask list
see_metatasks.desc: The metatask board unseals — read what the factions are rallying around.

propose_metatask.name: Propose a metatask
propose_metatask.desc: Draft a task built for your whole faction to apply to.

place_memory.name: Remember a place you've never been
place_memory.desc: Certain rooms feel already-visited. You've stopped questioning it.

apply_metatasks.name: Apply your faction's metatasks
apply_metatasks.desc: Take on the metatasks your faction has published.

three_plans.name: Hold three plans at once without confusion
three_plans.desc: Your mind now files contingencies the way it once filed excuses.

join_albescent.name: Join /Albescent
join_albescent.desc: Defect a life you carry to /Albescent — the order is joined in the field, never picked at creation.

underline_foresight.name: See the underline before it's drawn
underline_foresight.desc: You've read enough field stamps to know how this sentence ends.
